description:
Document in Arabic script. Likely a fiscal document recording amounts of money associated with the operations of dīwān al-maṭābikh al-maʿmūra (the state sugar refineries?) Cf. T-S AS 177.41 (PGPID 37011). The name "his slave Khalaf b. ʿAlī" appears at the upper left. A disbursement to the ghilmān of mawlānā is mentioned. Then, after a space, the number 200. Needs further examination.

On verso there is an ownership note for a book ("this daftar belongs to Yiṣḥaq b. Avraham").
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
